chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-68 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 8769/17 2. For orders on M.A 8770/17 3. For hearing. 27.11.2017 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Durrani, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. 1&2. Granted. 3. Learned Counsel for applicant submits that the applicant has been falsely implicated in the present case, however, wants to surrender before the concerned Court to seek pre-arrest bail in accordance with law. But since he apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police, he has filed this application for protective bail in order to enable him to surrender before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of 07 days subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 04.12.2017 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
